name: chr19_19q13_12_ZNF45_cluster
description: 19q13.12 KRAB-ZNF cluster centred on ZNF45 (also ZNF229, ZNF230, ZNF180, ZNF302). One of several large ZNF blocks on chr19 that together encode the largest paralog family in the human genome; KRAB-ZNFs are transposable element silencers.

architecture.internal_structure: ~12-15 KRAB-ZNF paralog genes in tandem head-to-tail at 90-98% identity over ~700 kb; conserved KRAB-A and ZF-array exons drive cross-mapping; short flanking SDs <30 kb.
